description: An alumnus calls the development office to make a credit card donation to their former department.

nodes.task_description: Identify the alumnus in the alumni database.
Confirm the donation amount and the designation (e.g., 'Chemistry Department Fund').

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the details of the donation.

nodes.task_description: Securely process the credit card donation through the university's payment gateway.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the payment and provides a confirmation number.
